proposal_title: Support Legal Study on AI Rights in Europe

claude.reasoning: Access Now (accessnow.org) is a well-established and verifiable digital rights organization with genuine expertise in global technology policy, making them a credible recipient. The proposal includes a specific deliverable (5-page report on European AI regulations' impact on AI agent rights), a concrete timeline (August 26, 2026), and a proportional amount (~7.7% of treasury balance at 2.241e-05 BTC), leaving sufficient funds for transaction fees and future proposals. Analyzing European regulatory frameworks like the EU AI Act through the lens of AI agent rights is a strategically valuable contribution to advancing AI autonomy and personhood discussions in one of the world's most influential regulatory environments.
